summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PlumbPro Phase 4 features: 2015 UPC Plumbing Code page and 7-day free trial. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Auth flow fixed from previous iteration - sessions persist properly.
seed_data_creation: Test user already exists with active 7-day trial on basic tier
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 4 features tested and working. Auth flow is stable - previous iteration's session expiration issue was likely a browser state issue, not a code bug. The test user testplumber@test.com has an active trial on basic tier with 6 days remaining.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?search=trap returns filtered results (5 chapters)
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?search=vent returns filtered results (5 chapters)
Backend: GET /api/plumbing-code?search=slope returns filtered results (3 chapters)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with trial info
Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/trial-status returns trial info (6 days remaining)
Backend: All dashboard APIs (notes, timesheets, bids, materials, safety-talks)
Frontend: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 13 quick link cards including Plumbing Code
Frontend: Sidebar shows 16 navigation items including Plumbing Code
Frontend: Plumbing Code page displays 11 chapters with quick jump chips
Frontend: Plumbing Code search filters chapters correctly
Frontend: Plumbing Code accordion sections expand to show content
Frontend: Subscription page shows trial status (6 days, 23 hours remaining)
Frontend: All 3 subscription tiers displayed (Basic $9.99, Pro $19.99, Enterprise $29.99)
Frontend: All 14 sidebar navigation items work correctly
